name: BankingProduct
description: A package of services and/or goods, accompanied by term and condition which is offered as a whole to (internal or external) customers.

attributeList.name: ProductIdentification
attributeList.description: The identifier of product e.g. ISIN Code.

attributeList.name: ProductType
attributeList.description: Specifies the category/type/class of product like financial product. Product can be categorized according to different perspectives.

attributeList.name: ProductLifecycleStatus
attributeList.description: Refers to the lifecycle of a product (e.g., initiated, announced, active, obsolete, withdrawn).

attributeList.name: ProductDescription
attributeList.description: A detailed explanation or commentary of product.

attributeList.name: ProductName
attributeList.description:
The name of Product. 

Open Banking: 
The name of the product used for marketing purposes from a customer perspective. I.e. what the customer would recognise.
